nasb.text: and you and the Levite and the alien who is among you shall rejoice in all the good which the Lord your God has given you and your household.

esv.text: And you shall rejoice in all the good that the Lord your God has given to you and to your house, you, and the Levite, and the sojourner who is among you.

cnv.text: 你和利未人，以及住在你們中間的外族人，都要因耶和華你的　神賜給你和你的家的一切好處而歡樂。

ccb.text: 你们和利未人以及住在你们中间的外族人，都要因你们的上帝耶和华赐给你们和你们家人的美物而欢喜快乐。
